news-korea-econ.title: China's American Mao: Inside Singham’s blueprint to ‘wage war' for a 'new world order'
news-korea-econ.description: A Fox News Digital investigation uncovers how Neville Roy Singham built an "International Revolutionary Front" of 2,000 organizations advancing Mao-inspired strategy of activism, media and messaging aligned with China’s vision for a "new world order."
